name: Depinsim
description: Depinsim is a decentralized connectivity infrastructure that transforms global communication into a value network. Built on the Free Mobile Internet Protocol (FMIP) and powered by BNB Chain, Depinsim enables users to earn, own, and exchange mobile data as digital assets — connecting the world through freedom, not fees. At its core, Depinsim bridges the gap between telecommunications and blockchain, creating a borderless, censorship-resistant, and user-owned mobile ecosystem. Every user becomes both a participant and a stakeholder in a global network where connectivity itself becomes a source of value.
